title: Knarfy's Dumb Potions
description: A collection of potions from Knarfy's Potion Video! This mod is pure chaos.
body:
# Knarfy's Dumb Potions
### _Based on your ideas!_

Check out the original video by Knarfy here:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fNqU9o4Udy8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

_This version of the mod was created specifically for the video and will not be updated.
For cleaner code and some extra features, [check out the Community Edition of the mod here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/knarfys-dumb-potions-mod-ce)_

### **IMPORTANT:** Required Mods
_(These Mods are REQUIRED for the Dumb Potions mod to function correctly! They also do not all install automatically! Some version switching may be required for everything to play nicely with each other.)_
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api/version/0.92.0+1.20.1)
- [Pehkui](https://modrinth.com/mod/pehkui/version/3.7.12+1.14.4-1.20.4)
- [Identity](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/identity/files/4687497)
- [Carpet](https://modrinth.com/mod/carpet/version/1.4.112)

### This mod includes 13 new potions based on comments from YouTube!
Each potion does something different, and combinations of different potion effects can result in some crazy chaos!

![The Potions!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/600d6812c4487193973e6a2ec0b4ad11c38f56e6.png)

As of now, these potions do not have brewing recipes. But, you can get any of them through the creative inventory, or you can use the `/givepotions` command to give yourself a shulker box with all of them sorted by Level.

Additionally, you can use the `/resetall` command to help reset the effects of the potions if you drank too many! A bucket of milk is also handy to have around!

_Thanks for being a supporter of Knarfy's content! Your views on videos and interactions with mods like this help us to create the best content we can for you! Enjoy the mod and all the chaos to be had with it!_


### !!! Warning for Content Creators !!!
The Potion of Theme Song includes songs from Epidemic Sound! These could get your video copyright claimed if you don't have a subscription!
You can find more information about Epidemic Sound on their website: [https://www.epidemicsound.com/](https://www.epidemicsound.com/)
